title: Cortex Dashboard Kit — schema_spec
description: The portable contract that ties the three skills together. The api-schema-extraction skill PRODUCES a document conforming to this schema; the demo-data-generator and dashboard-rag-scaffold skills CONSUME it.

source.description: The upstream API the demo data imitates.

auth.description: Auth scheme of the source API (informational).

app.description: Snowflake + app identity. Every deploy script and the Streamlit app read these — there is no hardcoding anywhere else.

warehouse.description: Warehouse for deploy, loads, Cortex Search, and the Streamlit query warehouse. ONE name, used everywhere.

company_name.description: Used in the RAG system prompt, e.g. 'Acme Solutions Inc'.

embed_model.description: Embedding model for the Cortex Search service.

tables.description: Logical tables. Order does not matter; generation order is resolved from depends_on / fk references.

knowledge_base.description: The corpus the Cortex Search service indexes and the RAG chat retrieves from.

table.description: Must also appear in `tables` so its DDL is generated.

content_col.description: Column the Cortex Search service indexes (ON clause).

attributes.description: Columns exposed as Cortex Search ATTRIBUTES / returned alongside content (e.g. CATEGORY, TITLE, AUDIENCE).

source_json.description: Path (relative to the spec file) to the KB content JSON: an array of objects keyed by the KB table's columns.

icon.description: Emoji or short string for the page icon.

assistant_intro.description: One-line intro shown above the chat.

suggested_prompts.description: Quick-start prompt buttons for the RAG chat.

search_columns.description: Columns returned by SEARCH_PREVIEW and folded into the grounding context.

grain.description: One human sentence: what one row represents.

row_count.description: Fixed number of rows to generate. Mutually exclusive with per_parent.

per_parent.description: Generate a variable number of child rows per parent row (e.g. order lines per order). Implies a foreign key to the parent.

is_chat_table.description: Marks CHAT_SESSIONS / CHAT_MESSAGES: DDL is generated but NO seed rows (the app writes them at runtime).

type.description: Snowflake type, e.g. NUMBER, VARCHAR(150), DATE, TIMESTAMP_NTZ, BOOLEAN, FLOAT, VARIANT.

autoincrement.description: Emit AUTOINCREMENT in DDL (use for chat-table PKs the app inserts into without an id).

default.description: Raw SQL default emitted in DDL, e.g. 'CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()'. Used mainly by chat tables.

api_field.description: The originating API field this maps to (informational; drives the porting story).

null_pct.description: Probability a generated value is NULL.

gen.description: Generator strategy. See docs/CONTRACT.md for the full vocabulary and which params each accepts.

faker_provider.description: For gen='faker': the Faker provider name, e.g. 'first_name', 'email', 'company'.

weights.description: For gen='choice': relative weights aligned to choices.

min.description: For gen='int'/'float'/'date'/'datetime': lower bound. Dates accept ISO or relative tokens ('today', '-5y', '-90d', '+12m').

format.description: For gen='date'/'datetime': strftime format. Defaults to ISO.

ref_column.description: For gen='fk': column to reference (defaults to that table's pk).

fk_strategy.description: For gen='fk': how to assign. 'parent' = the per_parent parent row's id.

template.description: For gen='template': a Python str.format string over already-generated columns in the same row, e.g. '{FIRST_NAME}.{LAST_NAME}@acme.com'. Use lower() via the engine's {col|lower} pipe.

step.description: For gen='sequence_date': cadence of the series.

anchor.description: For gen='sequence_date': start of the series (ISO or relative token).
